title: IAMMAI Transition Record
description: First bounded schema for transition records that preserve typed lawful protocol change across matter, state, containment, resolution, and lineage without collapsing into generic update or storage mutation.

transition_id.description: Stable identifier for the transition record.

matter_ref.description: Reference to the bounded matter within which the transition occurred.

source_ref.description: Reference to the source state or condition from which the transition moved.

target_ref.description: Reference to the target state or condition to which the transition moved.

occurred_at.description: Time at which the transition occurred.

related_validation_ref.description: Optional reference to a related validation artifact.

related_witness_ref.description: Optional reference to a related witness artifact.

related_governance_action_ref.description: Optional reference to a related governance action record.

predecessor_ref.description: Optional explicit predecessor reference where lineage-bearing succession applies.

successor_ref.description: Optional explicit successor reference where lineage-bearing succession applies.

resolution_type.description: Typed resolution family member when the transition is a resolution transition.

notes_ref.description: Optional reference to bounded supporting notes or related supporting material.
